description: Dead Man Incorporated (DMI) is a predominantly white organized crime enterprise founded in the late 1990s in the Maryland Department of Corrections by Perry Roark, James Sweeney, and Brian Jordan. Initially allied with the Black Guerrilla Family, the gang expanded into drug trafficking, murder, and other crimes. It operates in prisons and streets across Maryland, Virginia, and West Virginia, with an estimated 370 members. Internal divisions have emerged over ideology and direction.
